Description: Project Manager — overall permit coordination and oversight
Notes: Per LOE: R-01 Project Manager 6 hr for DEL-009-03

Description: Cost Estimator — permit cost review and exclusion confirmation
Notes: Per LOE: R-08 Cost Estimator 4 hr for DEL-009-03

Description: Safety code audit — identify all applicable Alberta Safety Code permit categories
Notes: Engage accredited agency to identify applicable permit categories (building, electrical, fire, gas, plumbing, elevator/crane). PARAMETRIC estimate.

Description: Identify permit application requirements per category and develop permit schedule
Notes: Obtain forms, documentation lists, processing timelines; integrate into project schedule. PARAMETRIC estimate.

Description: Prime Contractor Designation — form completion and submission
Notes: Obtain form from County; execute; distribute to site team. Per RFP Section 2.15.

Description: Permit application package preparation (all Safety Code categories)
Notes: Assemble application packages for anticipated 6+ categories. Qty of categories TBD pending audit; assumed 6 categories per Datasheet/Guidance.
Submit applications; record reference numbers; monitor status; respond to queries. Escalation per Step 8 criteria.

Description: Inspection coordination — scheduling and facilitation (all permit categories)
Notes: Schedule inspections; ensure County rep present; distribute reports; address deficiencies. Number of inspections TBD pending permit issuance.
Record permit numbers; integrate conditions into construction operations.
Transfer all permit certificates, inspection reports, and compliance documentation to DEL-009-04.
Prepare and submit Contractor OH&S Pre-qualification/Evaluation with Proposal. Per RFP Section 4.9.
